description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized Blincyto (blinatumomab) as a monotherapy for the treatment of pediatric patients aged 1 month or older with high-risk first relapsed Philidelphia chromosome negative CD19 positive B-cell precursor ALL as part of the consolidation therapy.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

contributions.description: On 2025-02-10, the EMA published an EPAR - Assessment report - Variation that recommended revising this approval's from being indicated for pediatric patients aged 1 year or older to 1 month or older.

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute
